2228910.name: Nofsky Zombies
2228910.description:
Nofsky Zombies is a wave based zombie shooter based on the 3D2A community. Fight off waves of zombies with friends or go solo as you explore various maps, characters, and weapons! Here you will find all of your favorite 3D printed guns designed by your favorite creators, including designs that aren't released yet! Traverse the maps and find different powerups, Perk machines, mystery boxes, and loot drops to enhance your gameplay and reach the highest rounds possible! Make sure to spend your points wisely as the maps have numerous doors and debris to clear. Stay safe in Nofsky Zombies, you never know what can happen next!
THIS PROJECT IS IN ALPHA. NOT INDICATIVE OF FINAL PRODUCT.
2228910.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
